plugins.prepareCmd: dotnet build --configuration Release -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet pack --no-build --configuration Release --include-symbols --include-source --output ./nupkgs -p:Version=${nextRelease.version} && dotnet CycloneDX Hexalith.FrontComposer.sln -o ./release-evidence/sbom --json --disable-github-licenses && python eng/release_evidence.py inventory --root . --expected eng/release-package-inventory.json --output ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json && dotnet nuget sign ./nupkgs/*.nupkg --certificate-path "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PATH" --certificate-password "$NUGET_SIGNING_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD" --timestamper "$NUGET_SIGNING_TIMESTAMPER" --output ./nupkgs-signed && dotnet nuget verify ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --all --verbosity normal > ./release-evidence/signing-verification.txt && python eng/release_evidence.py checksums --root . --pattern 'nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg' --pattern 'nupkgs/*.snupkg' --pattern 'release-evidence/sbom/**/*.json' --pattern 'release-evidence/signing-verification.txt' --pattern 'release-evidence/attestation-unavailable.md' --output ./release-evidence/checksums.json && python eng/release_evidence.py prepare-manifest --inventory ./release-evidence/package-inventory.json --checksums ./release-evidence/checksums.json --version ${nextRelease.version} --tag v${nextRelease.version} --output ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --diagnostics-output ./release-evidence/manifest-diagnostics.json && python eng/release_evidence.py seal-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/pre-publish-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/release-verification.json
plugins.publishCmd: python eng/release_evidence.py verify-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json && python eng/release_evidence.py classify-release --root . --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --test-results ./release-evidence/test-results.json --output ./release-evidence/release-readiness.json --require-publishable --event-name "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" --ref "$GITHUB_REF" --ref-protected "$GITHUB_REF_PROTECTED" --from-fork "false" --run-attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT:-1}" --owner-approved "$RELEASE_OWNER_APPROVED" --approver "$RELEASE_APPROVER" --approval-mechanism "$RELEASE_APPROVAL_MECHANISM" --attestation-status "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_STATUS" --fallback-approver "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_APPROVER" --fallback-expires-at "$RELEASE_ATTESTATION_FALLBACK_EXPIRES_AT" && (dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs-signed/*.nupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate && dotnet nuget push ./nupkgs/*.snupkg --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --skip-duplicate || (python eng/release_evidence.py seal-manifest --manifest ./release-evidence/sealed-manifest.json --output ./release-evidence/partial-publish-incident.json && exit 1))
